'''shanaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enaum|enaum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enaum|enaum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shanaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shænæhæth|shænæhæth]] || [[word:shænæhæj|shænæhæj]] || [[word:shænæhæsh|shænæhæsh]] || [[word:shænæhæ|shænæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shananahath|shananahath]] || [[word:shananahaj|shananahaj]] || [[word:shananahash|shananahash]] || [[word:shananaha|shananaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanahath|shanahath]] || [[word:shanahaj|shanahaj]] || [[word:shanahash|shanahash]] || [[word:shanaha|shanaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanafhath|shanafhath]] || [[word:shanafhaj|shanafhaj]] || [[word:shanafhash|shanafhash]] || [[word:shanafhaf|shanafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanahatha|shanahatha]] || [[word:shanahaja|shanahaja]] || [[word:shanahasha|shanahasha]] || [[word:shanahaka|shanahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanahath|shanahath]] || [[word:shanahaj|shanahaj]] || [[word:shanahash|shanahash]] || [[word:shanaha|shanaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanahathal|shanahathal]] || [[word:shanahajal|shanahajal]] || [[word:shanahashal|shanahashal]] || [[word:shanahakal|shanahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanahathatha|shanahathatha]] || [[word:shanahajaja|shanahajaja]] || [[word:shanahashasha|shanahashasha]] || [[word:shanahaka|shanahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanahathan|shanahathan]] || [[word:shanahajan|shanahajan]] || [[word:shanahashan|shanahashan]] || [[word:shanahakan|shanahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanahathaoro|shanahathaoro]] || [[word:shanahajaoro|shanahajaoro]] || [[word:shanahashaoro|shanahashaoro]] || [[word:shanahakaoro|shanahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
